tokens.name: --wds-font-family-display
tokens.value: "Madefor Display", Madefor, "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica,Arial, "メイリオ", "meiryo", "ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3", "hiragino kaku gothic pro", sans-serif

tokens.name: --wds-font-family-default
tokens.value: Madefor, "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica,Arial, "メイリオ", "meiryo", "ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3", "hiragino kaku gothic pro", sans-serif

tokens.name: --wds-shadow-surface-modal
tokens.value: var(--wds-shadow-x-50) var(--wds-shadow-y-600) var(--wds-shadow-blur-800) var(--wds-color-white-transparent-30), 0 var(--wds-shadow-blur-0) var(--wds-shadow-y-0) var(--wds-color-white-transparent-30)

tokens.name: --wds-shadow-300
tokens.value: 0 var(--wds-shadow-y-300) var(--wds-shadow-blur-800) 0 var(--wds-color-white-transparent-30), 0 var(--wds-shadow-blur-0) var(--wds-shadow-y-0) 0 var(--wds-color-white-transparent-30)

tokens.name: --wds-carousel-controls-shadow
tokens.value: 0 var(--wds-shadow-y-primary-modal) var(--wds-shadow-blur-primary-modal) var(--wds-shadow-fill-primary-modal), 0 var(--wds-shadow-blur-secondary-modal) var(--wds-shadow-y-secondary-modal) var(--wds-shadow-fill-secondary-modal)
